# ogre-source-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | ogre |
| Type | source-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding OGRE from the public source snapshot and preserving renderer/backend build choices.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public OGRE repository at the recorded ogre-master-head commit
- C++ compiler and build generator selected from the public repository documentation
- public/open rendering backend dependencies only
- public-safe sample scene or headless component smoke test
- local build transcript and dependency manifest captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public OGRE source repository listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the ogre-master-head snapshot record
- inspect repository build documentation, license notes, and configuration files
- configure a clean build with only public/open dependencies and explicitly record selected render backends
- compile the engine libraries, tools, and sample-capable components exposed by the public source tree
- run a minimal public-safe component or sample smoke test when available
- record build commands, diagnostics, dependency gaps, produced outputs, and sample constraints as public metadata

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- build configuration transcript
- compiler transcript
- engine library and tool inventory
- render backend selection notes
- public-safe smoke-test notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- ogre-source-repository
- ogre-licensing-record
